full_text:
Chen Zhi (Fengzong) 陳祗 (奉宗)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Chen Zhi (陳祗), styledFengzong (奉宗), was born in Pingxing county (presumably), Runan commandery. Allied himself with Huang Hao and gained great authority. Chen Zhi was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom. Chen Zhi lived during the Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
